title: write for me a summary about my self to be added in my CV, I have 17 years of experience as Executive Admin and Personal…

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: write for me a summary about my self to be added in my CV, I have 17 years of experience as Executive Admin and Personal Assistant and accountant

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: As an experienced executive admin, personal assistant, and accountant, I have spent the last 17 years providing exceptional support to busy professionals. My career has been marked by a strong work ethic and a dedication to ensuring that every task is completed accurately and efficiently. I possess excellent organizational skills, which have allowed me to manage complex schedules and extensive paperwork with ease. Additionally, I have a talent for communication and building relationships, which has enabled me to manage multiple stakeholders effectively. Overall, I am a highly motivated, detail-oriented individual who always strives to deliver excellence in everything that I do.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Rephrase the below experience and responsibilities in a professional way

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Original:
1. Managed calendars, email correspondence and phone calls for executives
2. Coordinated and scheduled meetings and events
3. Prepared documents, reports, and presentations
4. Handled travel arrangements, visas and accommodations 
5. Managed confidential and sensitive information with discretion and professionalism

Rephrased:
Throughout my career as an Executive Admin and Personal Assistant, I have been responsible for managing the busy schedules of executives, which includes coordinating their calendars, attending to their email correspondence, and screening their phone calls. I have effectively organized meetings and events by utilizing effective communication skills and the latest scheduling tools. I am proficient in the preparation of diverse documents, reports, and presentations, which have enabled me to support my superiors in their various duties. I have successfully facilitated travel arrangements such as visas and accommodations, providing timely and cost-effective solutions for my employers. I have a demonstrated ability to handle confidential and sensitive information with discretion and professionalism, ensuring that privacy is maintained at all times.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Original: 
I was responsible for managing the accounting department. I maintained financial records and prepared financial reports. I supervised and trained accounting staff. I reconciled bank statements and processed payroll.

Rephrased:
In my role as an accountant, I managed the accounting department, ensuring the integrity of financial records and the accuracy of financial reports. I took charge of supervising and training accounting staff, and motivated them to maintain high standards of performance. I facilitated the smooth operation of financial transactions by effectively reconciling bank statements and processing payroll.
